title: hackelia nervosa
intro: Hackelia nervosa, also known as St. Martha's Flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hackelia nervosa include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Hackelia nervosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the leaves and flowers being commonly used in herbal preparations.
